## BufferAppendErrorEvent type

Fired when a SourceBuffer append operation failed.

**Signature:**

```typescript
declare type BufferAppendErrorEvent = {
    type: MediaType;
    error: DOMException;
};
```
**References:** [MediaType](/cmaf-lite/reference/cmaf-lite.mediatype)
